tools.name: cti_get_health
tools.description: Check OpenCTI server connectivity and API health.

tools.name: cti_search_threat_intel
tools.description: Broad search across all OpenCTI entity types: indicators, threat actors, malware, techniques, CVEs, and reports.

tools.name: cti_search_entity
tools.description: Search OpenCTI entities filtered by a single type (more precise than cti_search_threat_intel).

tools.name: cti_lookup_ioc
tools.description: Look up a specific IOC (IP, hash, domain, or URL) and return full context.

tools.name: cti_get_recent_indicators
tools.description: Get recently added IOCs from the last N days.

tools.name: cti_get_entity
tools.description: Get full details for a specific entity by its OpenCTI UUID.

tools.name: cti_get_relationships
tools.description: Get relationships for an entity (who uses it, what it indicates, what it targets, etc.).

tools.name: cti_search_reports
tools.description: Search threat intelligence reports by keyword (campaign name, threat actor, malware family, CVE).
